source_jobs.title: VP of Sales
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Partisia Blockchain Applications is building, operating and promoting applications within the Partisia Blockchain https://partisiablockchain.com/ ecosystem.

Partisia Blockchain is a cutting edge company with its primary focus being blockchain technology.  This is a great opportunity for a self motivated dev to join early while we are still in a startup phase and have real influence in our company. 







ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a dedicated and analytical VP of sales to join Partisia Blockchain. The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing the daily sales activities, meeting with major clients/businesses/investors, writing sales reports and designing effective sales strategies. As a blockchain company, the projects will require general knowledge of how blockchains operate. We are a startup in year 3 so this is an opportunity to join relatively early on and have a real influence on the company.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Working with the marketing department to design print and online promotional materials for the company's products and services.

 - Identifying where improvements can be made and developing sales plans and strategies to achieve sales goals

 - Outlining and managing sales budgets

 - Setting quarterly and annual sales goals and motivating team members to help to achieve the goals

 - Monitoring the market and competitor products and activities and providing detailed sales forecasting

 - Reviewing customer activity, anticipating consumer needs, and improving customer satisfaction

 - Creating sales reports and providing feedback to the leadership team

 - Establishing and maintaining key customer relationships

 - Recruiting and hiring sales staff where necessary and developing training programs

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Partisia Blockchain Applications is building, operating and promoting applications within the Partisia Blockchain https://partisiablockchain.com/ ecosystem.

Partisia Blockchain is a cutting edge company with its primary focus being blockchain technology.  This is a great opportunity for a self motivated dev to join early while we are still in a startup phase and have real influence in our company. 






Responsibilities

 - Create UI for our desktop and mobile products following our established brand guidelines and visual language

 - Strong knowledge of both UX and UI design methodologies

 - Translate complex technological concepts and amounts of data into highly usable and intuitive user-centered products

 - Collaborate with designers, team leaders, product managers, and executives to define and execute workflows

 

Requirements

 - A portfolio that showcases experience in UI/UX design

 - 3+ years of professional design experience

 - Solid knowledge of both UX/UI design principles and methodologies

 - Ability to execute each stage of the design process from requirements gathering to prototyping

 - Strong understanding of fundamental design principles (layout, typography, color)

 - Ability to work within established brand guidelines and visual language

 - Proficiency in Figma

 - A professional attitude, team spirit, and passion for blockchain industry

 - A proactive approach: research, iterate, find solutions, learn

 - Proficient level of English

 - Good internet connection

 

This position is location-independent, but we ask that at least 5 of your working hours overlap with Eastern Standard Time (EST).

source_jobs.title: Junior Graphic Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Partisia Blockchain Applications is building, operating and promoting applications within the Partisia Blockchain https://partisiablockchain.com/ ecosystem.

Partisia Blockchain is a cutting edge company with its primary focus being blockchain technology.  This is a great opportunity for a self motivated dev to join early while we are still in a startup phase and have real influence in our company. 






Responsibilities

 - Create illustrations and icons for different purposes

 - Create diagrams, charts, and schemes to explain complex technological concepts

 - Create social media banners

 - Design Google Slides presentations

 - Collaborate with team leaders, product designers, and product managers within an established workflow

 

Requirements

 - A portfolio that showcases experience in graphic design and illustrations

 - 1+ years of professional design experience

 - Good knowledge of fundamental design principles (layout, typography, color)

 - Ability to work within established brand guidelines and visual language

 - Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop

 - Good knowledge of Figma

 - Ability to gather information and research technological topics

 - A proactive approach: research, iterate, find solutions, learn

 - A professional attitude, team spirit, and passion for blockchain industry

 - High-intermediate/advanced level of English

 - Good internet connection


DESIRED QUALIFICATIONS

 - Proficiency in Adobe After Effects and knowledge of fundamental animation principles

This position is location-independent, but we ask that at least 5 of your working hours overlap with Eastern Standard Time (EST).

source_jobs.title: VueJS Dev
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Partisia Blockchain Applications is building, operating and promoting applications within the Partisia Blockchain https://partisiablockchain.com/ ecosystem.

Partisia Blockchain is a cutting edge company with its primary focus being blockchain technology.  This is a great opportunity for a self motivated dev to join early while we are still in a startup phase and have real influence in our company. 







ABOUT THE ROLE

The primary function of this role will be frontend development but opportunities exists to move around within the team including UI design and backend APIs. 

 - Qualifications

 - 2-3 years experience in Frontend Development work

 - 2-3 years experience with JavaScript/Typescript

 - Experience with Vue3

 - Experience with Figma

 - Ability to troubleshoot and work independently when required

 - Benefits when working with Partisia

 - flexible working hours

 - remote first - you can work from anywhere you choose
   
   

This position is location-independent, but we ask that at least 5 of your working hours overlap with Eastern Standard Time (EST).

source_jobs.title: Business Development
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Partisia Blockchain Applications is building, operating and promoting applications within the Partisia Blockchain https://partisiablockchain.com/ ecosystem.

Partisia Blockchain is a cutting edge company with its primary focus being blockchain technology.  This is a great opportunity for a self motivated dev to join early while we are still in a startup phase and have real influence in our company. 







ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re seeking a qualified business development specialist to extend our global reach through expert discovery and exploration of new and untapped business opportunities and relationships. Our ideal candidate will be trusted to dive right in, take the lead and use their own initiative while also liaising with key stakeholders. As a blockchain company, the projects will require general knowledge of how blockchains operate. We are a startup in year 3 so this is an opportunity to join relatively early on and have a real influence on the company.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Identify and contact prospective clients using both in-bound leads and outbound prospecting strategies, where necessary 

 - Record and maintain outreach records in CRM system and provide up-to-date contact information and notes for leads and contacts

 - Coordinate internal staff to ensure the right individuals are present to support a client conversation

 - Prepare team members for external meetings by providing relationship background and corporate news and profile where necessary

 - Track and report on individual progress to monthly and quarterly goals for initial sales meetings and pipeline sourced

 - Attend networking activities to research and connect with prospective clients.

source_jobs.title: Marketing
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Partisia Blockchain Applications is building, operating and promoting applications within the Partisia Blockchain https://partisiablockchain.com/ ecosystem.

Partisia Blockchain is a cutting edge company with its primary focus being blockchain technology.  This is a great opportunity for a self motivated dev to join early while we are still in a startup phase and have real influence in our company. 







ABOUT THE ROLE

The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and executing marketing campaigns while managing and inspiring a team. He/she will be comfortable with day-to-day marketing activities, as well as long-term strategy, thriving with tight deadlines and changing needs. As a blockchain company, the projects will require general knowledge of how blockchains operate. We are a startup in year 3 so this is an opportunity to join relatively early on and have a real influence on the company.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Validating, owning, and implementing the marketing strategy, including managing the marketing budget.

 - Analyze customer insights, consumer trends, market analysis, and marketing best practices to build successful strategies

 - Create, maintain, and conduct analytics reporting across multiple platforms and extract key insights for future campaign development and go-to-market strategies, complete with formal proposals and recommendations on tactics

 - Partner with email, performance marketing and web team members to design, test and evolve lead nurturing tactics.

 - Building a content strategy for language applications, including thought leadership whitepapers, brochures, website content, landing page content, blogs, sales presentations, and case studies.

 - Present ideas and final deliverables to internal and external teams, and communicate with senior leaders about marketing programs, strategies, and budgets

notes: Blockchain-focused startup with a strong engineering core
